iti100:1.3: "Ahamasmi, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇo yācayogo sadā payatapāṇi antimadehadharo anuttaro bhisakko sallakatto. Tassa me tumhe puttā orasā mukhato jātā dhammajā dhammanimmitā dhammadāyādā, no āmisadāyādā.
iti100:1.4: Dvemāni, bhikkhave, dānāni – āmisadānañca dhammadānañca. Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ dānānaṁ yadidaṁ – dhammadānaṁ.
iti100:1.5: Dveme, bhikkhave, saṁvibhāgā – āmisasaṁvibhāgo ca dhammasaṁvibhāgo ca. Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ saṁvibhāgānaṁ yadidaṁ – dhammasaṁvibhāgo.
iti100:1.6: Dveme, bhikkhave, anuggahā – āmisānuggaho ca dhammānuggaho ca. Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ anuggahānaṁ yadidaṁ – dhammānuggaho.
iti100:1.7: Dveme, bhikkhave, yāgā – āmisayāgo ca dhammayāgo ca. Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ yāgānaṁ yadidaṁ – dhammayāgo"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti100:1.8:
"Yo dhammayāgaṁ ayajī amaccharī,
Tathāgato sabbabhūtānukampī;
Taṁ tādisaṁ devamanussaseṭṭhaṁ,
Sattā namassanti bhavassa pāragun"ti.
iti100:1.9:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
